decoder_heading: Customer data
ident_heading: Customer data
heading_content_part: We process a range of data when you install or use our products. This data may be directly or indirectly of a personal nature, i.e. it may involve other data sources. We collect much of this data in a pseudonymized or anonymized form. Pseudonymized means that it is no longer possible to attribute the personal data to a specific data subject without additional information. Anonymized means that the data subject can no longer be identified from the anonymized data.

decoder_heading: Customer data
ident_heading: Customer data
heading_content_part: Additional information on our personal data practices may be provided in product descriptions, contractual terms, supplemental privacy statements, or notices provided prior to or at the time we collect your personal data. Please seePrivacy Policyfor more details.Customer data

decoder_heading: Customer data
ident_heading: Customer data
heading_content_part: You have the option to use our products as an anonymous or registered customer. If you use our products and services anonymously, i.e. without having registered by providing your email address, we will not be able to perform the necessary and legally required identity check within the scope of your legal request.

decoder_heading: Avira – My Avira Account
ident_heading: Avira – My Avira Account
heading_content_part: Avira – My Avira AccountIf you register, we provide you with a web console in the form of a My Avira Account. This account references your email address and a password that you set. You can also turn on 2-factor authentication (2FA). We will then send you a text message with a security PIN to the stored telephone number. More information about this functionality can be foundhere

decoder_heading: Avira – My Avira Account
ident_heading: Avira – My Avira Account
heading_content_part: . You can use the web console to manage your account, your devices, and the software subscriptions of your Avira products. There is also the option for you to view your personal data, your settings, and other functionalities and to adjust them if necessary. For this purpose, we store, among other things, your contact data, your communication settings, the license information, device information, the expiration date of the license, and the service packages you have booked. We retain this data while you are an active customer with us, and for three years after you are no longer using our products.

heading_content_part: Avira Identity AssistantAvira Identity Assistant is a paid service that regularly scans the internet to detect if your personal data has been exposed on the dark web. Avira Identity Assistant uses advanced surveillance technology to regularly search websites and marketplaces as well as monitor private forums, social networks, and the dark web where information is traded and sold, looking for your personal information.
